title: An Act to Require Postage Prepaid Envelopes Be Provided for the Return of Absentee Ballots
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Apr 23, 2025
last_house_action: 4/8/2025 - The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on VETERANS AND LEGAL AFFAIRS . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/23/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on VETERANS AND LEGAL AFFAIRS suggested and ordered printed REFERENCE to the Committee on VETERANS AND LEGAL AFFAIRS Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on VETERANS AND LEGAL AFFAIRS . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
